_publications._publicationTitle: Icariin Promotes Osteogenic Differentiation in a Cell Model with NF1 Gene Knockout by Activating the cAMP/PKA/CREB Pathway.

_contextSnippet: after knocking out the NF1 gene, we observed the intracellular cAMP levels in 2−7 and 2−12 decreased, which was statistically significant compared with the control group
details: NF1 knockout C2C12 cells showed significantly decreased intracellular cAMP levels compared to control cells
